title: EnemyIndicator
description: EnemyIndicator makes your crosshair display differently when it is possible to hit an enemy.
body:
# INFORMATION
This mod that alters the player's **crosshair** to enhance **combat visibility**. When a player can **attack** another player, the mod **displays** four additional lines around the **original crosshair**, creating a clear visual **indicator** of the attack **possibility**. This mod makes **combat** easier by clearly **showing** when an **enemy** is within the player's attack range.

# NOTE
**Exordium** is to **fix** the **issue** while **hovering** over a **hitbox** it makes **your** health bar and shield bar **hardly seeable**.
